# XIAO ESP32-C6 (4 MB flash) — dual-slot: # Two ~1.98 MB app slots leave generous headroom for the TFT + JSON + WiFi + WebServer image.
# otadata is what the bootloader reads to pick the active slot and to support rollback.
# Trailing 0x3F0000–0x400000 (64 KB) left free — room for a coredump or NVS-backed
# OTA flags later without disturbing either app slot.
